An '''Iego ramshackle''' was a jury-rigged [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iego/Legends|Iego]]. They were made of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] detritus.
